title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PINAYAG. MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAPA. PROVINCE OF NUEVA VTZCAYA TO BE KNOWN AS PINAYAG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
115 OG NO. 6, 1189 (February 11, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11176, January 03, 2019 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PINAYAG. MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAPA. PROVINCE OF NUEVA VTZCAYA TO BE KNOWN AS PINAYAG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be

it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION I. There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, a national high school in Baraagav Pinayag, Municipality of Kayapa, Province of Niteva Vizcaya to be known as Pinayag National High School,

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in. the Department's program the operationalization of the Pinayag National High School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall formulate the rules and regulations implementing the provisions of this Act within ninety (90) days after its effectivity.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazelle

or in any newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on July 31, 2018 and October 10, 2018 respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 03 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
